howItWorks.intro: This trademark filing cost calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Total Cost
rules.formula: Total = (Per Class Fee × Classes) + Attorney Fee
rules.explanation: Government filing fee plus optional legal representation.

howItWorks.outro: Laws vary by jurisdiction and change frequently. This is not legal advice — consult a licensed attorney.

faq.q: How much does a trademark cost?
faq.a: USPTO filing is $250-350 per class. Attorney fees add $500-2000.

faq.q: How long does trademark registration take?
faq.a: Typically 8-12 months from filing to registration.
